pi_items.verified_value: Completely synthetic; generated by SIMCEP simulation platform (Lehmussola et al., 2007-2008)
pi_items.source: BBBC website https://bbbc.broadinstitute.org/BBBC005; verified to be computationally generated images simulating HCS experiments, not from biological samples

privileged_info_summary: BBBC005 is a real, public dataset of synthetic cell images from the Broad Bioimage Benchmark Collection. The specific file SIMCEPImages_A01_C1_F1_s01_w1.TIF is a verified 8-bit grayscale image (696×520 pixels) with binary ground truth (values 0 and 255). Expected output paths are /home/ga/ImageJ_Data/results/segmentation_difference.tif and /home/ga/ImageJ_Data/results/validation_metrics.csv. Target error bounds are 0.1 to 50.0 according to metadata, but the verifier implementation uses 0.1 to 60.0, representing a discrepancy. The images are completely synthetic, generated by the SIMCEP simulation platform.
